name: manage_rules
description: Create and manage query rules that customize Algolia search behavior for specific queries or patterns. Rules can pin or hide specific results, boost items matching certain criteria, add automatic filters, or inject custom data (like banners) into search responses.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: The name of the index to manage rules for.

parameters.name: rules
parameters.description: Array of rule objects. Each has an 'objectID', 'conditions' (when to trigger), and 'consequence' (what to do).

parameters.name: clearExistingRules
parameters.description: If true, clears all existing rules before saving. Default false.
